title: Amir component catalog (catalog/catalog.json)
description: Validates the full catalog document. Each entry describes one component group of the amir_system or amir_project plugin, with honest capability, dependency, credential, and health metadata per SPEC-amir_project-tools.md section 10.

official_source.description: URL of the upstream project, or 'internal' for Amir-authored components.

installation_mode.description: user-plugin: ships in amir_system at user scope. project-plugin-or-render: installed per project via 'claude plugin install amir_project ... --scope project' or rendered as a subset by tools/renderer.py.

dependencies.description: Hard dependencies. An entry that matches a catalog component id is a component dependency (must be selected too, transitively). Any other entry names an executable that must be on PATH (e.g. 'git').

optional_dependencies.description: Same semantics as dependencies, but absence only degrades functionality; never blocks activation.

conflicts_with.description: Component ids that must not be selected together with this one.

required_executables.description: Executables that must exist on PATH for this component to function.

required_credentials.description: Environment variable NAMES only; values are never stored or read by the catalog tooling beyond presence checks.

filesystem_access.description: Broadest filesystem surface the component touches. project_and_user_state includes per-user config/state dirs (e.g. ~/.amir); system means it may read outside the project (e.g. packet capture).

write_capabilities.description: What the component can create or modify (e.g. project_files, external_service:asana, cloud:aws, containers).

destructive_capabilities.description: Irreversible or high-risk operations the component can perform (each gated by confirmation rules).

health_check.description: A concrete runnable command that verifies the component's prerequisites work on this machine.

commands.description: Slash command names this group contributes (surfaced as /amir:<name>).

skills.description: Skill directory names this group contributes. create-project-doc is the sole hyphenated exception.

deprecated_aliases.description: Map old command name -> replacement command. Alias stubs print a deprecation warning; removed at amir_project 1.0.
